title: Starbucks India International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Starbucks India International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Starbucks India International Enterprises in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Starbucks India International Enterprises:
Starbucks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
